title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!
